config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 14/06/2024
		Purpose: if previous pag not logged in then revert to login page. 
	"""
	
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Washing Machine"
			self.custom.AreaId=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
			self.custom.LineId=self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
			self.custom.WorkStationId=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
			system.perspective.print("Custom currect workstation%s"%self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId)
			if self.session.custom.showSingleView:
				system.perspective.alterDock('Nav', {'handle':'hide'})
				system.perspective.closeDock('Nav')

			self.custom.PrevWorkStationID = Project_VECV.config.getMainWashingMachineID(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName)
			system.perspective.print("Custom currect prevWorkStation%s"%self.custom.PrevWorkStationID)		
			
			if self.session.custom.showSingleView:
				system.perspective.alterDock('Nav', {'handle':'hide'})
				system.perspective.closeDock('Nav')
			system.perspective.sendMessage("OrderWashingTableRefresh", scope='page')
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Sub Assembly Washing Machine'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Order/SubAssemblyWashingMachine')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Number Punching')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

transforms.code:
system.perspective.print("called")
    system.perspective.print(value)
    system.perspective.print(self.view.custom.PrevWorkStationID)
    system.perspective.print(self.view.custom.WorkStationId)
    system.perspective.print(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation)
    
    variable = '''
    DECLARE
        @MST_Area_Id INT = ''' + str(value) + ''',
        @PrevWorkStationID INT = ''' + str(self.view.custom.PrevWorkStationID) + ''',
        @WorkStationID INT = ''' + str(self.view.custom.WorkStationId) + ''',
        @WorkStationName varchar(50) = ''' + "'" + str(self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation) + "'" + '''; -- PartNumbers and AlternatePartNumbers Changes 02/07/2025

    BEGIN
        -- Temp table for production orders
        DECLARE @tempPRODUCTION_ORDER TABLE (
            order_number VARCHAR(200),
            serial_number NVARCHAR(200),
            SrNo INT,
            rn INT,
            M_BOMNumber VARCHAR(200),
            Description VARCHAR(500),
            OrderStatusid INT,
            OrderStatus VARCHAR(200),
            order_category VARCHAR(255),
            psn INT,
            m_BOM_id INT,
            MST_Area_Id INT,
            MST_Event_Id INT,
            special_instruction VARCHAR(255),
            id INT,
            GearRation NVARCHAR(200),
            CreatedDate DATETIME,
            ActionT INT
        );
    
        INSERT INTO @tempPRODUCTION_ORDER
        SELECT DISTINCT
            PO.order_number,
            ISNULL(po.serial_number, '') AS serial_number,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY PO.serial_number) AS SrNo,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY po.serial_number ORDER BY SE.CreatedDate) AS rn,
            mb.M_BOMNumber,
            mb.Description,
            POS.OrderStatusid,
            POS.OrderStatus,
            po.order_category,
            psn,
            PO.m_BOM_id,
            PO.MST_Area_Id,
            se.MST_Event_Id,
            ISNULL(PO.special_instruction, '') AS special_instruction,
            PO.id,
            cd.GearRation,
            se.CreatedDate,
            0 AS ActionT
        FROM PRODUCTION_ORDER PO
        INNER JOIN m_bom MB ON PO.m_BOM_id = MB.m_BOM_id
        INNER JOIN MST_Production_OrderStatus POS ON POS.OrderStatusid = PO.OrderStatusid AND POS.OrderStatusid IN (6)
        INNER JOIN ClassificationData CD ON CD.m_BOM_id = MB.m_BOM_id AND CD.IsActive = 1
        INNER JOIN TRN_Station_Events SE ON SE.SerialNumber = PO.serial_number AND SE.MST_Event_Id = 5
        INNER JOIN TRN_ReleasedProductionOrder TR ON PO.serial_number = TR.SerialNumber AND TR.IsPDI = 0
        WHERE PO.IsWashingMachineStatus = 1
          AND PO.MST_Area_Id = @MST_Area_Id
          AND SE.MST_WorkStation_Id = @PrevWorkStationID
          AND ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER(po.special_instruction))), '') NOT IN ('CSPD', 'VOR', 'VOR/CSPD', 'VOR /CSPD', 'VOR/ CSPD', 'VOR / CSPD')
        ORDER BY SE.CreatedDate;
    
        DELETE FROM @tempPRODUCTION_ORDER
        WHERE serial_number IN (
            SELECT tss.SerialNumber
            FROM TRN_StationStatus tss
            INNER JOIN @tempPRODUCTION_ORDER tpm ON tss.SerialNumber = tpm.serial_number
            WHERE tss.MST_WorkStation_Id = @WorkStationID
        );
    
        DECLARE @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER TABLE (
            order_number VARCHAR(200),
            serial_number NVARCHAR(200),
            SrNo INT,
            rn INT,
            M_BOMNumber VARCHAR(200),
            Description VARCHAR(500),
            OrderStatusid INT,
            OrderStatus VARCHAR(200),
            order_category VARCHAR(255),
            psn INT,
            m_BOM_id INT,
            MST_Area_Id INT,
            MST_Event_Id INT,
            special_instruction VARCHAR(255),
            id INT,
            GearRation NVARCHAR(200),
            CreatedDate DATETIME,
            ActionT INT
        );
    
        INSERT INTO @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER
        SELECT *
        FROM @tempPRODUCTION_ORDER
        ORDER BY CreatedDate;
    
        DECLARE @sn NVARCHAR(50);
        SET @sn = (SELECT TOP 1 serial_number FROM @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER ORDER BY psn);
    
        UPDATE TPO
        SET ActionT = 2, OrderStatus = 'Running'
        FROM @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER TPO
        INNER JOIN TRN_Station_Events SE ON SE.SerialNumber = TPO.serial_number
        WHERE SE.MST_Event_Id = 3 AND SE.MST_WorkStation_Id = @WorkStationID;
    
        IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT serial_number FROM @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER WHERE ActionT = 2)
        BEGIN
            UPDATE TOP (1) @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER
            SET ActionT = 1, OrderStatus = 'Released'
            WHERE serial_number = @sn;
        END;
    
        -- PartNumbers and AlternatePartNumbers Changes 02/07/2025
		DECLARE @IswashingMachineFlag INT;
		-- 0 None
		-- 1 Main Line
		-- 2 Hub Line
		-- 3 DH Line
		-- 4 Titan Main Line
		-- 5 Titan DH Line
		SET @isWashingMachineFlag = 
		CASE
			WHEN @WorkStationName = 'LAML10' THEN 1 
		END;
        DECLARE @AltParts TABLE (
            M_BOM_Id INT,
            PartNumbers NVARCHAR(MAX),
            AlternatePartNumbers NVARCHAR(MAX)
	    );

    
        -- Step 1: Get distinct PartNumbers
        WITH DistinctParts AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT EP.M_BOM_Id, MM.M_MaterialNumber
            FROM TRN_ErrorProof EP
            JOIN M_Material MM ON MM.M_Material_Id = EP.M_Material_Id
            WHERE EP.IsActive = 1
              AND EP.IsDeleted = 0
              AND EP.MST_Area_Id = @MST_Area_Id
              AND EP.isWashingMachine = @isWashingMachineFlag
              AND (EP.M_BOM_Id IN (SELECT DISTINCT m_BOM_id FROM @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER) OR EP.M_BOM_Id IS NULL)
        )
        SELECT 
            M_BOM_Id,
            STRING_AGG(M_MaterialNumber, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY M_MaterialNumber) AS PartNumbers
        INTO #PartNumbers
        FROM DistinctParts
        GROUP BY M_BOM_Id;
    
        -- Step 2: Get distinct AlternatePartNumbers
        WITH DistinctAltParts AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT EP.M_BOM_Id, ALT.M_MaterialNumber
            FROM TRN_ErrorProof EP
            CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(EP.ALTERNATEPART, ',') AS Split
            JOIN M_Material ALT ON ALT.M_Material_Id = TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(Split.value)) AS INT)
            WHERE EP.IsActive = 1
              AND EP.IsDeleted = 0
              AND EP.MST_Area_Id = @MST_Area_Id
              AND EP.isWashingMachine = @isWashingMachineFlag
              AND (EP.M_BOM_Id IN (SELECT DISTINCT m_BOM_id FROM @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER) OR EP.M_BOM_Id IS NULL)
        )
        SELECT 
            M_BOM_Id,
            STRING_AGG(M_MaterialNumber, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY M_MaterialNumber) AS AlternatePartNumbers
        INTO #AltPartNumbers
        FROM DistinctAltParts
        GROUP BY M_BOM_Id;
    
        -- Step 3: Merge both into @AltParts
        INSERT INTO @AltParts (M_BOM_Id, PartNumbers, AlternatePartNumbers)
        SELECT 
            COALESCE(pn.M_BOM_Id, alt.M_BOM_Id) AS M_BOM_Id,
            pn.PartNumbers,
            alt.AlternatePartNumbers
        FROM #PartNumbers pn
        FULL OUTER JOIN #AltPartNumbers alt ON pn.M_BOM_Id = alt.M_BOM_Id;
    
        DROP TABLE #PartNumbers;
        DROP TABLE #AltPartNumbers;
    
        -- Final output
        SELECT 
            TPO.order_number,
            TPO.SrNo,
            TPO.serial_number,
            TPO.M_BOMNumber,
            TPO.Description,
            TPO.OrderStatusid,
            CASE 
                WHEN TPO.OrderStatus = 'Released' THEN 'Released'
                WHEN TPO.OrderStatus = 'Running' THEN 'Running'
                ELSE 'Sequenced'
            END AS OrderStatus,
            TPO.order_category,
            TPO.psn,
            TPO.m_BOM_id,
            TPO.MST_Area_Id,
            TPO.MST_Event_Id,
            TPO.special_instruction,
            TPO.id,
            TPO.GearRation,
            TPO.CreatedDate,
            TPO.ActionT,
            AP.PartNumbers,
            AP.AlternatePartNumbers
        FROM @NewtempPRODUCTION_ORDER TPO
        LEFT JOIN @AltParts AP ON AP.M_BOM_Id = TPO.m_BOM_id -- PartNumbers and AlternatePartNumbers Changes 02/07/2025
        WHERE TPO.rn = 1
        ORDER BY TPO.psn;
    END;
    '''

    data = system.db.runPrepQuery(variable)
    system.perspective.print(data)
    return data
